chunk_text: Yeu cau duoc gui trong vong 7 ngay lam viec ke tu thoi diem xac nhan don hang.
Nhan vien duoi 3 nam kinh nghiem duoc 10 ngay phep nam, ban HR 2025.
Chunk noi dung du dai de vuot nguong expectation do dai toi thieu trong cleaned export.
Dong nay co noi dung hop le nhung thieu exported_at de kich hoat rule R9.
